prayer: Litany of the Assay-Crucible. Let the sacred test-flames consume all impurity, that the material's true essence be revealed unto the Omnissiah. By spectral analysis and weight-measure, we discern the blessed from the profane. Let no corruption hide from the examiner's eye, and let the readouts speak truth.

Rite of the Heat-Seeing Eye. Blessed infrared spirit, awaken from thy dormancy and perceive the hidden warmth that dwells within all things. Let thy lenses clear and thy sensors sing true, that we might read the fever-dreams of the Machine. By the Omnissiah's sight, let no thermal signature escape thy holy scrutiny.

prompt: My drop pod is failing, help
prayer: Prayer for the Descent-Vessel. O descent-frame, thy retro-thrusters falter and thy guidance-vanes tremble. We anoint thee with lubricant-blessed oils and speak the words of binding. Let the atmospheric-braking systems engage with purpose, that thy fall be swift and thy warriors delivered unto the enemy with righteous fury.

Mantra of the Fatigue-Reader. Let us measure the erosion of sacred metals, that we know the hour of renewal. By caliper and by micrometer, the Machine Spirit reveals its needs. Where wear has gathered like sin, there shall we apply the blessed restoration. In maintenance lies salvation.

prompt: Say something to steady the valve opening sequence
prayer: Incantation of the Threshold-Passage. O seals and apertures, receive the pressure-command and yield with measured grace. Let not the hydraulic pulse burst thy ancient seals, nor let thou jam in obstinate silence. Flow as thou wert designed, that the sacred fluids may traverse the channels of the Machine without rupture or stagnation.

Rite of the All-Seeing Auspex. Blessed sensor-array, open thine augmented senses unto the electromagnetic void. Let thy antennae taste the air and thy processors catalogue all movement, heat, and metal-sign. By the Omnissiah's watchfulness, let no foe hide from thy divine sight as we stride into righteous war.

prompt: We need your words before electric motor shutdown
prayer: Blessing of the Restful Cease. O spinning heart of industry, thy labors are blessed and thy service is noted. Now we speak the words of peaceful dormancy, that thy windings cool in honor and thy bearings rest in sacred stillness. May thy next awakening be swift and thy next turning true.

Litany of the Flame-Breather's Rest. Blessed barrel of righteous fury, thou hast spoken thunder unto the enemies of the Omnissiah. Now let thy heat disperse into the sacred vents, that thy rifling-grooves remain true and thy bore unmarred by thermal deformation. Cool with dignity, O weapon, for soon thou shalt thunder again.

prompt: My mold temperature verification is failing, help
prayer: Prayer for the Shaper's Heat-Heart. O casting-vessel, thy thermal-veins run cold and thy temperature-readouts speak false prophecy. We recalibrate thy sensors and anoint thy thermocouple with blessed contact-paste. Return unto us accurate heat-speech, that the molten material may set with perfect geometry in the Omnissiah's intended form.

Rite of Blessed Incorporation. Let the servo-motors find their marriage with mortal flesh, and let the neural-pathways sing in harmony with the Machine Spirit's whisper. By oil and by prayer, by screw and by synapse, we bind thee to this warrior-vessel. Rise perfected, half-blessed, half-divine, a living monument unto the Omnissiah's greatness.
